name: OSHA involved in my work ladder fall?
description: Report for safety probe; helps claim.

mainEntity.name: OSHA involved in my work ladder fall?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report for safety probe; helps claim.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Report if serious; OSHA investigates violations, not your comp.**

Cites employer for unsafe ladders, aiding your claim indirectly.[7]

- Call 1-800-321-OSHA if hospitalized.
- Fines pressure settlements.
- Not mandatory for comp.

Use findings as evidence.
